nodes.label: Unit tests for browser_cdp tool.  Uses a tiny in-process ``websockets`` server t
A tiny CDP-over-WebSocket mock.      Each client gets a greeting-free stream.  T
Register a handler ``handler(params, session_id) -> dict or Exception``.
Start a CDP mock and route tool resolution to it.
Gate closes when no CDP URL is set — even if the browser toolset is     otherwis
Gate opens as soon as a CDP URL is resolvable.
Even with a CDP URL, gate closes if the overall browser toolset is     unavailab
